message:
test(remote): add 32 E2E tests for remote runtime under network faults (bd-2bohm)

Comprehensive test suite covering spawn/ack/cancel/result lifecycle,
lease expiry, idempotency (duplicate + conflict), causal ordering,
multi-node chain and fan-out, partition/heal recovery, crash/restart,
deterministic replay, saga compensation, and stress under lossy/WAN/
congested conditions. Also fixes borrow conflict in harness
deliver_packets introduced by encode_message refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
